rules.singleActiveFeature: Only one feature can be 'in_progress' at a time
rules.evidenceRequired: Must have verification evidence before marking 'pass'
rules.verificationMandatory: All checklist items must run and pass before marking 'pass'

statusDefinitions.in_progress: Currently being worked on (only one allowed)
statusDefinitions.blocked: Cannot proceed â€” reason documented in notes

features.title: Project Scaffold + Collections
features.description: Next.js 15 + Payload CMS 3 + SQLite setup. Collections: users, customers, products, categories, media, orders. Seed script.
verification: npm run dev starts without errors
Payload admin panel accessible at /admin
npx tsx src/seed.ts creates products and categories
evidence: Dev server starts on port 3000
Admin panel accessible, collections visible
Seed creates 4 bike products with categories

features.title: Access Control + Hooks
features.description: Reusable access functions in src/access/index.ts. Product hooks: beforeChange forces draft status, afterChange logs, beforeDelete guards.
verification: Creating product via admin sets status=draft automatically
npm run lint exits 0
evidence: beforeChange hook confirmed forcing draft on create
isSeeding context flag bypasses the hook correctly

features.title: REST & Local API
features.description: Custom Route Handlers: /api/products-count. Local API usage via getPayload({ config }) in Server Components.
verification: GET /api/products-count returns JSON with count
Products page loads via Local API
evidence: /api/products-count returns {count: N}
Products RSC fetches and renders product list

features.title: Rich Text (Lexical) + Relations
features.description: Product description field uses Lexical editor. Products relate to categories (many-to-one). depth parameter controls populate.
verification: Product description renders rich text in frontend
Category filter on products page works
evidence: Rich text renders paragraphs/headings from Lexical JSON
Category sidebar filters products correctly

features.title: Admin Auth (Users collection)
features.description: Standard Payload JWT auth for admin panel users. Login/logout. Header shows email when logged in.
verification: Admin login at /admin works
Header shows user email on frontend when logged in as admin
evidence: Admin login creates session, shows email in Header
Logout clears session

features.title: Cart Context + CartReducer
features.description: Client-side CartContext using useReducer + localStorage. Actions: ADD, REMOVE, CLEAR, INIT, UPDATE_QUANTITY. CartLink shows count in Header.
verification: Add to cart button adds product to cart
Cart count updates in Header
Cart persists after page refresh (localStorage)
Quantity update works on cart page
evidence: CartLink counter increments on add
localStorage key contains cart items after refresh
+/- buttons update quantity and total

features.title: Checkout + Orders
features.description: POST /api/checkout creates Order in Payload. Requires authenticated customer. Customer collection with separate JWT (customer-token cookie).
verification: Checkout requires authentication (401 without token)
Successful checkout creates order in DB
Orders page shows order history for current customer
evidence: POST /api/checkout returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Order record created with correct items and total
Orders page renders order list

features.title: Globals (SiteSettings)
features.description: SiteSettings global: storeName, contactEmail, bannerText, showBanner. Accessible via payload.findGlobal().
verification: SiteSettings editable in Payload admin
Global data accessible in Server Components
evidence: SiteSettings visible in admin panel
findGlobal('site-settings') returns correct data

features.title: Media Uploads + Image Sizes
features.description: Media collection with image resizing via sharp. Sizes: thumbnail (300x300), card (768px), hero (1920px). Product images use next/image with shimmer blur placeholder.
verification: Image upload in admin creates 3 size variants
Product cards show images with shimmer loading effect
evidence: Uploaded image generates thumbnail/card/hero variants
Product list renders with blurDataURL shimmer

features.title: Email / Nodemailer
features.description: afterChange hook on Orders sends email notification via Nodemailer + Ethereal (test SMTP). ETHEREAL_USER/PASS env vars.
verification: Order creation triggers email hook
Email visible in Ethereal inbox
evidence: afterChange hook fires on order save
Ethereal test email received after checkout

features.title: Parallel Routes (@sidebar)
features.description: Products layout uses Next.js Parallel Routes: @sidebar slot shows categories list. default.tsx prevents 404 on navigation.
verification: Products page shows sidebar with category links
Category links filter products without full page reload
Sidebar shows on /products but not on nested routes
evidence: @sidebar slot renders independently
default.tsx returns null preventing 404
Category filter searchParam drives products query

features.title: Dark / Light Theme
features.description: ThemeToggle component (Sun/Moon). CSS vars for theme colors. Anti-FOUC inline script in <head>. Header/sidebar always dark.
verification: Toggle switches theme without flash
Theme persists after page refresh
Header remains dark regardless of theme
evidence: localStorage theme key persists across refresh
No FOUC observed on dark-mode page load
Header bg unchanged on toggle

features.title: Auth utility refactoring (getAuthenticatedUser)
features.description: Extract auth logic into src/lib/auth.ts: getAuthenticatedUser() checks customer-token cookie first, falls back to Payload admin auth. Used in orders page, products page, checkout route, Header.
verification: npm run lint exits 0
npm run test:int exits 0
Orders page redirects unauthenticated users to /login
Products page shows auth-gated content correctly
Header shows correct user email for both customer and admin auth
POST /api/checkout returns 401 for unauthenticated, creates order for authenticated
evidence: npm run lint: PASS (1 non-blocking warning: unused req in afterChange.ts)
npm run test:int: PASS (1 test, 62s)
GET /orders without auth → redirect to /login (confirmed via window.location.href)
GET /products without auth → 2 products + 'Войдите' gate message
GET /products with auth (test@harness.dev) → 6 products, no gate
Header .header-email shows 'test@harness.dev' after customer login
POST /api/checkout without auth → { status: 401, error: 'Unauthorized' }
POST /api/checkout with auth → { status: 201, orderStatus: 'pending', total: 99900 }
GET /orders with auth → shows order list with correct total and status 'В обработке'

features.title: Product Search via @payloadcms/plugin-search
features.description: Полнотекстовый поиск по продуктам. Индексирует name + description (plain text из Lexical) + category.name. UI: нативная HTML-форма на /products, submit → ?q=. Поле задизейблено для неавторизованных.
verification: npm run lint exits 0
npm run test:int exits 0
Поиск по name находит товар
Поиск по category.name (напр. 'горн') находит товары из категории
Пустой запрос / сброс показывает все товары
Запрос без результатов показывает 'Ничего не найдено'
Неавторизованный: поле задизейблено с подсказкой 'Войдите для поиска'
search-коллекция видима в /admin
evidence: npm run lint: PASS (1 non-blocking warning: unused req в afterChange.ts)
npm run test:int: PASS (1 test, 25s)
GET /products?q=Pinarello → 1 результат: Pinarello Dogma F
GET /products?q=Гравел → 1 результат: Canyon Grail CF SLX 8 Di2 (categoryName индексируется через beforeSync)
GET /products (без q) → 6 товаров, поле поиска пустое
GET /products?q=xyzxyzxyz123 → текст 'ничего не найдено'
GET /products без auth → input[name=q] disabled=true, placeholder='Войдите для поиска'
/admin/collections/search открывается без ошибок, Search Results видна в nav
features.notes: Три бага исправлены в ходе верификации: (1) @payloadcms/plugin-search версия 3.84.1 → 3.78.0 (версионный mismatch); (2) products/page.tsx where-запрос расширен до OR [title, meta.description, meta.categoryName]; (3) beforeSync стал async + использует payload.findByID когда category — ID (depth:0 при reindex).

features.title: Order Intake module — server-side price verification
features.description: Extract order creation logic into src/lib/orders.ts. createOrder(items, customerId) fetches product prices from DB (ignores client-provided price), validates items array, calculates total server-side, creates Order via Payload Local API. checkout/route.ts becomes a thin HTTP adapter.
verification: npm run lint exits 0
npm run test:int exits 0
POST /api/checkout with tampered price → order.total uses DB price, not client price
POST /api/checkout with non-existent productId → 400 error
POST /api/checkout with items=null or items not array → 400 error
POST /api/checkout with valid items → order created, total matches DB prices × quantities
src/lib/orders.ts exports createOrder() directly callable via Payload Local API
evidence: npm run lint: PASS (1 pre-existing warning: unused req in afterChange.ts)
npm run test:int: PASS (1 test, 3s)
POST /api/checkout with items=null → 400 {error: 'items must be a non-empty array'}
POST /api/checkout with items=[] → 400 {error: 'items must be a non-empty array'}
POST /api/checkout with productId=99999 → 400 {error: 'Product not found: 99999'}
POST /api/checkout with tampered price=1, productId=11 (dbPrice=249900) → 201, order.total=249900 (DB price used, client price ignored)
POST /api/checkout without auth → 401
src/lib/orders.ts exports createOrder() and ValidationError
features.notes: Deepening opportunity #1 from architecture review. Security fix: client-provided prices replaced with DB prices. Seam: createOrder() is the new interface for order creation business logic. Three-step fix: (1) extract createOrder() to src/lib/orders.ts; (2) add ValidationError class for 400 vs 500 distinction; (3) wrap payload.findByID in try/catch because Payload throws (not returns null) on NotFound.

features.title: Stripe Checkout integration (hosted)
features.description: Replace toast-based checkout with real Stripe Hosted Checkout. Order created BEFORE payment with status=pending, Stripe Session linked via stripeSessionId field, webhook flips status→paid on checkout.session.completed. Frontend cart redirects to session.url; /orders/[id] shows order state.
verification: npm run lint exits 0
npm run test:int exits 0 (incl. stripe-checkout.int.spec.ts from Phase 6)
stripeSessionId field visible on Order docs in /admin and in payload-types.ts
POST /api/checkout returns { checkoutUrl, orderId } and persists session.id on the order
POST /api/webhooks/stripe with valid signature flips order pending → paid
POST /api/webhooks/stripe with invalid signature returns 400
Webhook is idempotent (replay does not double-process)
Cart 'Оформить заказ' redirects to Stripe-hosted page; cancel returns to /cart
/orders/[id] renders items/total/status (pending/paid) and gates unauthenticated access
evidence: Phase 1: stripeSessionId text+indexed+readOnly added to Orders collection; payload-types.ts regenerated with stripeSessionId?: string | null on Order interface

Phase 2: stripe@22.1.1 installed; src/lib/stripe.ts (singleton with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY guard); checkout/route.ts creates Order(pending) → Stripe Session → writes stripeSessionId → returns {checkoutUrl, orderId}; metadata.orderId attached as webhook fallback

Phase 3: src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts with runtime=nodejs, raw body via req.text(), constructEvent signature verify, primary lookup by stripeSessionId + fallback by metadata.orderId, idempotent (paid→200 short-circuit), 200 OK on unknown event types
Phase 4: cart/page.tsx redirects via window.location.href = checkoutUrl, disables both buttons during in-flight, does NOT clearCart on session create (cancel-to-/cart preserves items)

Phase 5: /orders/[id]/page.tsx — async RSC, params/searchParams as Promise (Next 15), auth-gated via getAuthenticatedUser, findByID with overrideAccess:false (foreign order → 404), green 'Оплата прошла успешно' banner on session_id + status=paid, neutral 'Платёж обрабатывается' banner on session_id + status=pending; ClearCartOnPaid client component mounted inside the paid banner clears cart exactly once
Phase 5 bonus: /orders list statusConfig synced with current schema (pending/paid/shipped/cancelled — removed stale confirmed/delivered)

Phase 6: tests/int/stripe-checkout.int.spec.ts — 15 tests across 3 describe blocks (createOrder 8, webhook 6, checkout auth-gate 1). Real Payload + DB, signed webhook requests via stripe.webhooks.generateTestHeaderString, Stripe SDK partially mocked (real webhooks + stubbed sessions.create). All 16 tests in suite pass (15 new + 1 baseline) in ~10s, bash init.sh PASS
features.notes: Branch: feat/stripe-checkout (off main). Env vars in .env: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOKS_SIGNING_SECRET. Local e2e: `stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe`, test card 4242 4242 4242 4242. Bug fixed mid-session: ClearCartOnPaid had [clearCart] in deps → infinite loop (clearCart recreated each CartProvider render); fixed to [] + eslint-disable. Open question: webhook handler swallows DB errors → 200 to avoid Stripe retries — acceptable for portfolio, may want to return 500 in prod for transient DB failures.
